name: Enterprise Data Platform
description: Enterprise-wide data platform enabling analytics, AI/ML capabilities, and data democratization across all L&G business units. Foundation for Customer 360, predictive analytics, and regulatory reporting automation.

features.name: Data Lake Implementation
features.description: Implement cloud-native data lake on Azure ADLS Gen2 with Delta Lake format, supporting structured and unstructured data ingestion from 47 source systems.
acceptanceCriteria: Data lake ingests from all 47 identified source systems
Delta Lake time travel enabled for 90-day lookback
Data quality checks automated with 99.5% accuracy threshold
GDPR/PII detection and masking operational

stories.name: Azure ADLS Gen2 Infrastructure Setup
stories.description: As a Data Engineer, I need the core Azure ADLS Gen2 infrastructure provisioned so that we have a scalable foundation for the data lake.
acceptanceCriteria: Given Azure subscription is available, When infrastructure is provisioned, Then ADLS Gen2 accounts are created in UK South and UK West regions
Given security requirements, When storage is configured, Then private endpoints and managed identities are enabled
Given DR requirements, When replication is set up, Then geo-redundant storage is enabled with 15-minute RPO

tasks.name: Create Terraform modules for ADLS Gen2
Set up managed identities and RBAC

stories.name: Delta Lake Format Implementation
stories.description: As a Data Analyst, I need data stored in Delta Lake format so that I can perform time-travel queries and have ACID transactions.
acceptanceCriteria: Given raw data lands in bronze layer, When processing completes, Then data is converted to Delta format in silver layer
Given Delta tables exist, When user queries historical data, Then time travel works for 90-day lookback
Given concurrent writes occur, When transactions complete, Then ACID guarantees are maintained

tasks.name: Set up time travel retention policies

stories.name: Source System Connectors - Wave 1
stories.description: As a Data Engineer, I need connectors to the first 15 priority source systems so that critical business data flows into the lake.
acceptanceCriteria: Given source systems are identified, When connectors are deployed, Then 15 Wave 1 systems are ingesting data
Given data arrives, When quality checks run, Then 99.5% of records pass validation
Given schema changes occur, When drift is detected, Then alerts notify data stewards within 5 minutes

stories.name: PII Detection and GDPR Compliance
stories.description: As a Data Protection Officer, I need automated PII detection and masking so that we maintain GDPR compliance across all data assets.
acceptanceCriteria: Given data ingestion occurs, When PII scan runs, Then all 23 defined PII types are detected
Given PII is detected, When masking applies, Then data is tokenized or anonymized per policy
Given access request arrives, When DPO queries, Then full data lineage is available within 24 hours

features.name: Analytics Platform
features.description: Self-service analytics platform with semantic layer, enabling business users to create reports and dashboards without IT dependency.
acceptanceCriteria: Business users can create dashboards without SQL knowledge
Semantic layer covers 80% of common business metrics
Query performance <5 seconds for 95th percentile
Row-level security enforced based on AD groups

stories.name: Semantic Layer with dbt
stories.description: As a Business Analyst, I need a semantic layer so that I can query business metrics using familiar terms without writing SQL.
acceptanceCriteria: Given business glossary exists, When semantic layer is built, Then 150+ business metrics are defined
Given user selects metrics, When query executes, Then correct SQL is generated automatically
Given metric definitions change, When dbt runs, Then downstream reports update automatically

stories.name: Power BI Premium Workspace Setup
stories.description: As a Report Developer, I need Power BI Premium workspaces configured so that I can publish enterprise reports with appropriate governance.
acceptanceCriteria: Given licensing is approved, When workspaces are created, Then 12 departmental workspaces exist
Given workspace exists, When permissions are set, Then AD group-based access is enforced
Given reports are published, When refresh runs, Then incremental refresh completes within SLA

stories.name: Row-Level Security Implementation
stories.description: As a Security Officer, I need row-level security so that users only see data they are authorized to access.
acceptanceCriteria: Given user logs in, When RLS evaluates, Then only permitted business unit data is visible
Given 50 concurrent users query, When RLS applies, Then query performance remains <5 seconds
Given access audit is requested, When report runs, Then full access history is available

tasks.name: Design RLS model with AD integration

stories.name: Executive Dashboard Suite
stories.description: As a C-Suite Executive, I need a suite of dashboards so that I can monitor key business metrics in real-time.
acceptanceCriteria: Given executive logs in, When dashboard loads, Then 8 key KPIs are visible within 3 seconds
Given drill-down is clicked, When navigation occurs, Then detailed view loads within 2 seconds
Given mobile access is needed, When executive uses phone, Then responsive design works correctly

tasks.name: Configure real-time streaming for key metrics

features.name: AI/ML Infrastructure
features.description: MLOps platform enabling data scientists to develop, deploy, and monitor machine learning models at enterprise scale.
acceptanceCriteria: Data scientists can deploy models to production within 4 hours
Model drift detection alerts within 24 hours of degradation
Feature store serves 10,000 predictions/second
Full model lineage from training data to production

stories.name: MLflow Tracking and Registry
stories.description: As a Data Scientist, I need MLflow so that I can track experiments and register models for deployment.
acceptanceCriteria: Given experiment runs, When training completes, Then metrics, parameters, and artifacts are logged
Given model is approved, When registered, Then it appears in model registry with versioning
Given model is promoted, When deployment triggers, Then CI/CD pipeline executes

tasks.name: Set up model registry with approval workflow
Integrate with Azure DevOps for CI/CD

stories.name: Feature Store Implementation
stories.description: As a Data Scientist, I need a feature store so that I can reuse features across models and ensure training-serving consistency.
acceptanceCriteria: Given features are defined, When stored, Then they are versioned and documented
Given model training occurs, When features are fetched, Then point-in-time correctness is guaranteed
Given prediction request arrives, When serving occurs, Then <10ms feature retrieval latency

tasks.name: Evaluate and select feature store (Feast vs Databricks)

stories.name: Model Monitoring and Drift Detection
stories.description: As an ML Engineer, I need model monitoring so that I can detect when models degrade and need retraining.
acceptanceCriteria: Given model is deployed, When predictions occur, Then input/output distributions are tracked
Given drift threshold is breached, When detection runs, Then alert fires within 1 hour
Given retraining is needed, When triggered, Then automated pipeline executes

tasks.name: Implement Evidently AI for drift detection

stories.name: GPU Compute Cluster
stories.description: As a Data Scientist, I need GPU compute so that I can train deep learning models efficiently.
acceptanceCriteria: Given training job submitted, When GPU available, Then job starts within 5 minutes
Given multiple users need GPU, When contention occurs, Then fair scheduling applies
Given job completes, When resources released, Then cost optimization achieved

risks.name: Mainframe data extraction complexity
risks.mitigation: Engaged legacy specialist Richard Thompson; built custom COBOL extraction routines

risks.name: Power BI Premium licensing costs
risks.mitigation: Negotiated enterprise agreement; monitoring usage to optimize capacity

risks.name: Data quality from legacy systems
risks.mitigation: Implemented Great Expectations framework; weekly data quality reviews

risks.name: GPU compute cost overrun
risks.mitigation: Will use spot instances and auto-scaling; budget alerts configured

risks.name: Adoption resistance from business users
risks.mitigation: Change management program in progress; 12 data champions identified

dependencies.name: Azure Landing Zone
dependencies.description: Network connectivity and security baseline required before deployment

dependencies.name: Oracle Financials API Access
dependencies.description: Read-only API credentials for real-time financial data

dependencies.name: Mainframe batch window
dependencies.description: 4-hour nightly window for mainframe data extraction

dependencies.name: AD Group provisioning
dependencies.description: 150+ AD groups needed for row-level security
